item.title: Cognizant partners with Cognition to scale Devin and Windsurf across its engineering organization and global clients
item.description: Cognizant has partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin and Windsurf across its engineering teams and customer base.

item.title: Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business
item.description: Infosys, a global leader in digital services and consulting, has partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin, the AI software engineer, across its organization and global client base.

item.title: Devin Review: AI to Stop Slop
item.description: As code generation gets easier, code review is the new bottleneck. That

item.title: Windsurf Codemaps: Understand Code, Before You Vibe It
item.description: Codemaps is meant to offer a shared understanding of a system between humans and AI, enabling your AI to teach you about the code you are looking at quickly and elegantly. A codemap can be generated about any system or snippet to illuminate its code paths, helping users learn and recall. Codemaps allows AI to be a partner that explains code in an accurate and consistent way, rather than generating tons of inscrutable slop.

item.title: Introducing SWE-1.5: Our Fast Agent Model
item.description: Today we’re releasing SWE-1.5, the latest in our family of models optimized for software engineering. It is a frontier-size model with hundreds of billions of parameters that achieves near-SOTA coding performance. It also sets a new standard for speed: we partnered with Cerebras to serve it at up to 950 tok/s – 6x faster than Haiku 4.5 and 13x faster than Sonnet 4.5. SWE-1.5 is now available in Windsurf!

item.title: Automating .NET Framework → .NET Core with Devin
item.description: Engineering teams dread migrating from .NET Framework to .NET Core. However, autonomous coding agents are rapidly changing the previously known timelines. What once took months, teams are now finishing in as little as two weeks — with Devin.

item.title: Introducing SWE-grep and SWE-grep-mini: RL for Multi-Turn, Fast Context Retrieval
item.description: We trained SWE-grep and SWE-grep-mini, fast agentic models specialized in highly parallel context retrieval. They match the retrieval capabilities of frontier coding models, while taking an order of magnitude less time. Available now in Windsurf’s new Fast Context subagent, and our new SWE-grep demo playground!

item.title: Announcing Devin Agent Preview with Sonnet 4.5
item.description: Announcing Devin Agent Preview with Sonnet 4.5

item.title: Rebuilding Devin for Claude Sonnet 4.5: Lessons and Challenges
item.description: We rebuilt Devin for Claude Sonnet 4.5. The new version is 2x faster, 12% better on our Junior Developer Evals, and it

item.title: Funding, growth, and the next frontier of AI coding agents
item.description: Cognition has raised over $400M at a $10.2B post-money valuation led by Founders Fund. Other existing investors are similarly doubling down including Lux Capital and 8VC (who jointly led our previous round), Neo, Elad Gil, Definition Capital, and Swish VC. We’re also joined by new investors including Bain Capital Ventures, Hanabi Capital, and D1 Capital.

item.title: How Eight Sleep Uses Devin as a Data Analyst
item.description: Building the future of sleep requires us to make data-driven product, operations, and finance decisions. But as a small team, we faced a challenge every scaling company knows well: the flood of random data asks. We needed leverage. So we hired an analyst who never sleeps: Devin AI.

item.title: Build Your Own AI Data Analyst
item.description: Our #analytics Slack channel looks completely different than it did a year ago. Like most companies, we used to struggle with analytics. Even seemingly simple questions like "Why is enterprise plan revenue spiking for this cohort?" led to ping chains of doom. Getting answers often took days or weeks. Now, it takes minutes. What changed? We trained our own 24/7 on-demand data scientist.

item.title: Enterprise Guide: Migrating from Jenkins to GitHub Actions at Scale
item.description: How modern DevOps teams are replacing legacy CI/CD pipelines and accelerating transformation using AI automation.

item.title: Cognition’s acquisition of Windsurf
item.description: Cognition has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Windsurf, the agentic IDE.

item.title: Coding Agents 101: The Art of Actually Getting Things Done
item.description: Coding Agents 101: The Art of Actually Getting Things Done

item.title: Don’t Build Multi-Agents
item.description: Frameworks for LLM Agents have been surprisingly disappointing. I want to offer some principles for building agents based on our own trial & error, and explain why some tempting ideas are actually quite bad in practice.

item.title: Blockdiff: How we built our own file format for VM disk snapshots
item.description: How we built blockdiff, an open-source tool for rapid block-level diffs and snapshots of VM disks.

item.title: The DeepWiki MCP Server
item.description: The DeepWiki MCP server is here. Get codebase context and answers about any public GitHub repository in seconds.

item.title: The Devin Open Source Initiative is Back
item.description: Open source code maintainers can now apply for free Devin ACUs.

item.title: Kevin-32B: Multi-Turn RL for Writing CUDA Kernels
item.description: We explore reinforcement learning in a multi-turn setting, using intermediate feedback from the environment, and masking model thoughts to avoid exploding context over multiple turns.

item.title: DeepWiki: AI docs for any repo
item.description: Turn any public GitHub repo into up-to-date documentation you can talk to, for free.

item.title: Linktree expands social media platform coverage and ships new features with Devin
item.description: How Linktree ships new prototypes and support for new social media platforms with Devin, while skipping the lengthy prioritization process.

item.title: Devin 101: Automatic PR Reviews with the Devin API
item.description: How to set up a Github Actions workflow that uses the Devin API to review PRs

item.title: Scaling Open Source Development of GOAT with Devin: A Crossmint Case Study
item.description: How Crossmint is scaling Open Source Development of GOAT with Devin as part of the Devin Open Source Initiative

item.title: Devin is now generally available
item.description: The work Devin has been doing and how your team can start using Devin today.

item.title: Announcing The Devin Open Source Initiative
item.description: OSS contributions Devin has already helped to make, and more about our Open Source Initiative.

item.title: A review of OpenAI’s o1 and how we evaluate coding agents
item.description: Testing OpenAI’s newest o1 series of models with Devin for autonomous coding tasks

item.title: Using Devin to Recover from the CrowdStrike Outage
item.description: A lot of businesses and critical systems were affected by the CrowdStrike outage yesterday, and we wanted to explore how Devin can help.

item.title: SWE-bench technical report
item.description: One of our goals at Cognition is to enable Devin, an AI agent specializing in software development, to contribute code successfully to large, complex codebases.

item.title: Introducing Devin, the first AI software engineer
item.description: Setting a new state of the art on the SWE-bench coding benchmark. Meet Devin, the world’s first fully autonomous AI software engineer.
